description:
Running with Rifles is a top-down tactical shooter where you start as a
lowly private and work your way up the ranks in a massive open-world
campaign. Conquer maps, complete side missions, and unlock weapons and
radio calls as you progress through 10 maps and 2 final battles.

In Archipelago, your rank promotions, weapons, radio calls, equipment,
and map access keys are shuffled into the multiworld item pool!

v0.1.0.description:
First public release of the RWR Archipelago multiworld mod.

## Downloads
- **rwr.apworld** — Place in `%APPDATA%/Archipelago/custom_worlds/`
- **rwr_archipelago_mod.zip** — Extract into `RunningWithRifles/media/packages/`

See the README for full setup instructions.
v0.1.0.title: v0.1.0 — Initial Release

v0.2.0.description:
Fix item/location balance

- Squad slots now scale to available locations instead of always adding 9
- Precollect 1 squad slot so the starting map is reachable
- Starting map (Keepsake Bay) no longer requires rank >= 1
v0.2.0.title: v0.2.0

v0.3.0.description:
## New Features

**RP Shop** — Players can now spend in-game RP to purchase Archipelago checks using the `/apbuy` command. Each map has a configurable number of purchasable checks.

- `rp_shop` — Enable/disable the RP Shop
- `rp_shop_per_map` — Checks per map (1-5, default 3)
- `rp_shop_cost` — RP cost per purchase (200-5000, default 1000)
- `/apshop` command shows remaining checks and current RP

**Death Link Mode** — New option `death_link_mode` to choose what happens when receiving a death link:

- `kill` — Instant death (default, same as before)
- `random_trap` — Apply a random trap instead of killing you

## Bug Fixes

**Weapon delivery checks broken for AP-unlocked weapons** — Delivering 5 of a weapon (e.g. G36, M16A4) no longer fails to trigger the check when that weapon was already received as an AP item. The vanilla delivery system was filtering out weapons already in faction resources, preventing the delivery objective from being created.

## Presets

"Maximum Checks" and "Completionist" presets now include RP Shop (5 per map).
v0.3.0.title: v0.3.0

v0.4.0.description:
## New Features

**196 individual weapons** — All 9 weapon categories expanded from 76 to 196 weapons. A budget system ensures weapons fit within available location slots, with random selection each seed.

**Companion weapons** — Guns with integrated grenade launchers (M16+M203, SCAR+EGLM, etc.) now unlock together automatically.

**C4 always precollected** — C4 is now given at the start of every game, ensuring side missions are always accessible.

## Bug Fixes

**XP system overhaul** — Fixed a bug where XP would spiral to 100K+ and give 97 squad members. The mod now forces `initial_xp=0` and `xp_factor=1.0`, then clamps XP regularly via positive `xp_reward` with cooldown. Target: 200 base XP + 1000 per Squadmate Slot.

**Delivery locations block progression** — Map keys, Squadmate Slots and other progression items can no longer be placed on delivery locations (weapon deliveries, briefcases, laptops), which are long and RNG-dependent.

## Removed

**Squad Desertion trap** — Removed (broken and unfun). 3 traps remain: Demotion, Radio Jammer, Friendly Fire.

**`base_capture_mode: none`** — Removed. Minimum capture mode is now `progressive`.

## Other

- Death Link `random_trap` now picks from 3 traps instead of 4
- XP tracking persisted in mod state for reconnect recovery
- Simplified access rules (C4 always available)
- 141 client tests passing
v0.4.0.title: v0.4.0

v0.5.0.description:
## What's new
- **Starting Map option** — choose between Moorland Trenches, Keepsake Bay (default), or Old Fort Creek
- **Co-op support** — 2 players sharing the same AP slot via RWR's native LAN/Internet co-op. Guest character is auto-synced to the current AP rank on join
- **Periodic rank sync** — clamps XP to the AP rank threshold every 15s (prevents drift from kills or natural XP gain)
- **Lower RP Shop default cost** — 1000 → 500 RP per check
v0.5.0.title: v0.5.0
